title: astragalus calycinus
intro: Astragalus calycinus, also known as milk vetch or milk vetch astragalus, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus calycinus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root, capsules, and teas, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other holistic practices.
